_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in performing human behavioral analysis
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing human oversight mechanisms for AI-assisted decision-making, including escalation triggers, override procedures, human-in-the-loop protocols, and meaningful human control verification.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI AG domain. Skill AG-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-010 (AI, cosine: 0.492), LS-S-009 (LS, cosine: 0.471).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.533). Shared vocabulary: [human, skill]. NICE-only terms [analysis, behavioral, performing] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assisted, control, decision, designing, escalation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.902, R=0.840). P exceeds R by 0.062 — the NICE element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.2%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in performing human behavioral analysis" and "Skill in designing human oversight mechanisms for AI-assisted decision-making, i". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.497 ≈ STS 0.533 (gap 0.036). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [human, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [human, skill]. NICE-only: [analysis, behavioral, performing]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assisted, control, decision, designing, escalation].
